prompt: Create a retro 2.5D anime thumbnail in a cinematic 16:9 frame, showing a close-up of a mischievous gothic anime girl leaning toward the camera in a cluttered analog electronics room. She has long straight black hair with blunt bangs, teal-green eyes, pale skin, small blush marks, pointed ears, and a wide unsettling grin with sharp triangular teeth. She wears a black top and a thin black choker, with her face centered and dominating the composition, shoulders cropped at the bottom, direct eye contact, playful but eerie expression. The background is a dim retro tech studio with exactly two visible CRT televisions: one large CRT on the left displaying bright cyan static and one darker CRT on the lower right with a small blue glow; include shelves, cables, ceiling pipes, hanging wires, old equipment, and a high window with washed-out daylight. Use a NORINORI CORE-inspired retro 2.5D aesthetic: cel-shaded anime character over a semi-realistic grungy room, thick ink outlines, muted olive-gray shadows, teal and magenta chromatic aberration along edges, VHS scanline noise, slight fisheye wide-angle distortion, low-light atmosphere, crisp face details, gritty analog texture, 1990s cyberpunk anime mood. Keep the image text-free, no logos, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a retro 2.5D anime thumbnail in a cinematic 16:9 frame, showing a close-up of a mischievous gothic anime girl leaning toward the camera in a cluttered analog electronics room. She has long straight black hair with blunt bangs, teal-green eyes, pale skin, small blush marks, pointed ears, and a wide unsettling grin with sharp triangular teeth. She wears a black top and a thin black choker, with her face centered and dominating the composition, shoulders cropped at the bottom, direct eye contact, playful but eerie expression. The background is a dim retro tech studio with exactly two visible CRT televisions: one large CRT on the left displaying bright cyan static and one darker CRT on the lower right with a small blue glow; include shelves, cables, ceiling pipes, hanging wires, old equipment, and a high window with washed-out daylight. Use a NORINORI CORE-inspired retro 2.5D aesthetic: cel-shaded anime character over a semi-realistic grungy room, thick ink outlines, muted olive-gray shadows, teal and magenta chromatic aberration along edges, VHS scanline noise, slight fisheye wide-angle distortion, low-light atmosphere, crisp face details, gritty analog texture, 1990s cyberpunk anime mood. Keep the image text-free, no logos, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张 16:9 电影画幅的复古 2.5D 动漫缩略图，展示 一位调皮的哥特动漫少女 在杂乱的模拟电子设备房间中向镜头倾身的特写。她留着长直的 黑发，配有齐刘海，拥有青绿色双眼、苍白的皮肤、淡淡的腮红、尖耳朵，以及露出尖锐三角形牙齿的诡异大笑。她身穿黑色上衣，戴着细黑色颈圈，面部居中占据构图主体，肩膀在底部被裁切，直视镜头，表情俏皮而诡异。背景是一个昏暗的复古科技工作室，清晰可见两台 CRT 电视：左侧是一台显示着明亮青色雪花点的大型 CRT，右下方是一台发出微弱蓝光的较暗 CRT；包含货架、线缆、天花板管道、悬挂的电线、旧设备以及一扇透出褪色日光的高窗。采用 NORINORI CORE 风格的复古 2.5D 美学：在半写实的脏乱房间背景上呈现赛璐珞风格的动漫角色，粗线条勾勒，柔和的橄榄灰色阴影，边缘带有青色和洋红色的色差，VHS 扫描线噪点，轻微的鱼眼广角畸变，低光氛围，清晰的面部细节，粗粝的模拟质感，1990 年代赛博朋克动漫氛围。保持画面无文字、无 Logo、无水印，且无其他多余角色。
